Test Scenario: Authenticate with a valid username and password
Test Steps: 1) Open the authentication request. 2) Enter a valid username. 3) Enter a valid password. 4) Submit the request.
Expected Result: The system accepts the credentials, returns a successful response and provides a non-empty authentication token.

Test Scenario: Attempt authentication with a valid username and invalid password
Test Steps: 1) Open the authentication request. 2) Enter a valid username. 3) Enter an invalid password. 4) Submit the request.
Expected Result: The system rejects the authentication attempt, does not return a valid token and provides an appropriate unauthorized or validation response.

Test Scenario: Attempt authentication without a username
Test Steps: 1) Open the authentication request. 2) Omit the username field. 3) Enter a valid password. 4) Submit the request.
Expected Result: The system rejects the request, does not return an authentication token and identifies the missing or invalid username.

Test Scenario: Attempt authentication without a password
Test Steps: 1) Open the authentication request. 2) Enter a valid username. 3) Omit the password field. 4) Submit the request.
Expected Result: The system rejects the request, does not return an authentication token and identifies the missing or invalid password.

Test Scenario: Attempt authentication with blank username and password values
Test Steps: 1) Open the authentication request. 2) Enter a blank username value. 3) Enter a blank password value. 4) Submit the request.
Expected Result: The system rejects the request, does not return an authentication token and provides an appropriate validation or unauthorized response.

Requirement ID: BOOK-001; BOOK-002; BOOK-003; BOOK-004; BOOK-005; BOOK-006; BOOK-007; BOOK-008
Test Scenario: Create a booking using valid required and optional information
Test Data: First name=Dhruba; Last name=Aryal; Total price=450; Deposit paid=true; Check-in=2026-08-10; Checkout=2026-08-14; Additional needs=Breakfast
Test Steps: 1) Open the create-booking request. 2) Enter a valid first name and last name. 3) Enter a positive total price. 4) Enter a valid deposit-paid value. 5) Enter a valid check-in date. 6) Enter a checkout date after the check-in date. 7) Enter optional additional needs. 8) Submit the request.
Expected Result: The system creates the booking, returns a unique booking ID and returns the submitted booking information accurately.

Test Scenario: Attempt to create a booking without a first name
Test Data: First name is omitted; Last name=Aryal; Total price=450; Deposit paid=true; Check-in=2026-08-10; Checkout=2026-08-14
Test Steps: 1) Open the create-booking request. 2) Omit the first-name field. 3) Enter valid values in all other required fields. 4) Submit the request.
Expected Result: The system rejects the booking, does not create a valid booking ID and identifies the missing or invalid first name.

Test Scenario: Attempt to create a booking without booking dates
Test Data: First name=Dhruba; Last name=Aryal; Total price=450; Deposit paid=true; Booking dates are omitted
Test Steps: 1) Open the create-booking request. 2) Enter valid customer, price and deposit information. 3) Omit the booking-dates object or fields. 4) Submit the request.
Expected Result: The system rejects the booking, does not create a valid booking ID and identifies the missing booking dates.

Test Scenario: Attempt to create a booking with checkout date before check-in date
Test Data: First name=Dhruba; Last name=Aryal; Total price=450; Deposit paid=true; Check-in=2026-08-14; Checkout=2026-08-10
Test Steps: 1) Open the create-booking request. 2) Enter valid customer, price and deposit information. 3) Enter a check-in date. 4) Enter a checkout date earlier than the check-in date. 5) Submit the request.
Expected Result: The system rejects the booking, does not create a valid booking ID and provides a clear date-validation response.

Test Scenario: Attempt to create a booking with a total price of zero
Test Data: First name=Dhruba; Last name=Aryal; Total price=0; Deposit paid=false; Check-in=2026-08-10; Checkout=2026-08-14
Test Steps: 1) Open the create-booking request. 2) Enter valid customer and date information. 3) Enter zero as the total price. 4) Submit the request.
Expected Result: The system rejects the booking, does not create a valid booking ID and identifies that the total price must be greater than zero.

Test Scenario: Attempt to create a booking without a last name
Test Data: First name=Dhruba; Last name is omitted; Total price=450; Deposit paid=true; Check-in=2026-08-10; Checkout=2026-08-14
Test Steps: 1) Open the create-booking request. 2) Enter a valid first name. 3) Omit the last-name field. 4) Enter valid values in all other required fields. 5) Submit the request.
Expected Result: The system rejects the booking, does not return a valid booking ID and identifies the missing or invalid last name.

Test Scenario: Create a booking using the minimum positive total price of one
Test Data: First name=Dhruba; Last name=Aryal; Total price=1; Deposit paid=false; Check-in=2026-08-10; Checkout=2026-08-14
Test Steps: 1) Open the create-booking request. 2) Enter valid customer and date information. 3) Enter 1 as the total price. 4) Submit the request.
Expected Result: The system accepts the valid positive boundary value, creates the booking and returns a unique booking ID.

Test Scenario: Attempt to create a booking using a negative total price
Test Data: First name=Dhruba; Last name=Aryal; Total price=-1; Deposit paid=false; Check-in=2026-08-10; Checkout=2026-08-14
Test Steps: 1) Open the create-booking request. 2) Enter valid customer and date information. 3) Enter -1 as the total price. 4) Submit the request.
Expected Result: The system rejects the booking, does not create a valid booking ID and identifies that the total price must be greater than zero.

Test Scenario: Retrieve an existing booking using a valid booking identifier
Preconditions: A valid booking exists and its identifier is available
Test Steps: 1) Create or identify an existing booking. 2) Copy its booking identifier. 3) Open the retrieve-booking request. 4) Enter the valid booking identifier. 5) Submit the request.
Expected Result: The system returns a successful response and displays the complete booking information associated with the identifier.

Test Scenario: Attempt to retrieve a booking using a nonexistent identifier
Test Steps: 1) Open the retrieve-booking request. 2) Enter a booking identifier that does not exist. 3) Submit the request.
Expected Result: The system returns an appropriate not-found response and does not return booking information.

Test Scenario: Search for bookings using a supported customer-name filter
Preconditions: At least one booking exists for the specified customer
Test Steps: 1) Open the booking-search request. 2) Enter the supported first-name and last-name search parameters. 3) Submit the request.
Expected Result: The system returns booking identifiers matching the supported customer-name criteria.

Test Scenario: Update an existing booking using valid authentication and valid information
Preconditions: A valid booking and authentication token exist
Test Data: Booking ID={{bookingId}}; Token={{authToken}}; Updated total price=525; Updated additional needs=Late checkout
Test Steps: 1) Create or identify an existing booking. 2) Obtain a valid authentication token. 3) Open the update-booking request. 4) Enter the valid booking identifier. 5) Provide the authentication token. 6) Change the total price and additional-needs value. 7) Submit the request.
Expected Result: The system updates the booking successfully and returns the new booking information accurately.

Test Scenario: Attempt to update an existing booking without authentication
Test Data: Booking ID={{bookingId}}; Authentication token is omitted
Test Steps: 1) Create or identify an existing booking. 2) Open the update-booking request. 3) Enter the valid booking identifier. 4) Do not provide authentication. 5) Enter valid updated booking information. 6) Submit the request.
Expected Result: The system rejects the update request and the original booking information remains unchanged.

Test Scenario: Attempt to update a nonexistent booking using valid authentication
Test Steps: 1) Obtain a valid authentication token. 2) Open the update-booking request. 3) Enter a nonexistent booking identifier. 4) Enter valid booking information. 5) Submit the request.
Expected Result: The system returns an appropriate not-found response and does not create or update a booking.

Test Scenario: Partially update the additional-needs value of an existing booking
Preconditions: A valid booking and authentication token exist
Test Data: Booking ID={{bookingId}}; Token={{authToken}}; Additional needs=Airport pickup
Test Steps: 1) Create or identify an existing booking. 2) Obtain a valid authentication token. 3) Open the partial-update request. 4) Enter the valid booking identifier. 5) Provide valid authentication. 6) Change only the additional-needs value. 7) Submit the request.
Expected Result: The system updates only the specified additional-needs field and leaves the remaining booking information unchanged.

Test Scenario: Attempt to update a booking with checkout date before check-in date
Preconditions: A valid booking and authentication token exist
Test Steps: 1) Create or identify an existing booking. 2) Obtain a valid authentication token. 3) Open the update-booking request. 4) Enter the valid booking identifier. 5) Enter a checkout date earlier than the check-in date. 6) Submit the request.
Expected Result: The system rejects the invalid update and retains the previously valid booking dates.

Test Scenario: Delete an existing booking using valid authentication
Preconditions: A valid booking and authentication token exist
Test Steps: 1) Create or identify an existing booking. 2) Obtain a valid authentication token. 3) Open the delete-booking request. 4) Enter the valid booking identifier. 5) Provide valid authentication. 6) Submit the request.
Expected Result: The system deletes the booking successfully and returns the expected successful deletion response.

Test Scenario: Attempt to retrieve a booking after successful deletion
Test Steps: 1) Delete an existing booking successfully. 2) Copy the deleted booking identifier. 3) Open the retrieve-booking request. 4) Enter the deleted booking identifier. 5) Submit the request.
Expected Result: The system returns an appropriate not-found response and does not return the deleted booking information.

Test Scenario: Attempt to delete an existing booking without authentication
Test Data: Booking ID={{bookingId}}; Authentication token is omitted
Test Steps: 1) Create or identify an existing booking. 2) Open the delete-booking request. 3) Enter the valid booking identifier. 4) Do not provide authentication. 5) Submit the request.
Expected Result: The system rejects the deletion request and the booking remains available for retrieval.

Test Scenario: Attempt to delete a nonexistent booking using valid authentication
Test Steps: 1) Obtain a valid authentication token. 2) Open the delete-booking request. 3) Enter a nonexistent booking identifier. 4) Provide valid authentication. 5) Submit the request.
Expected Result: The system returns an appropriate not-found or unsuccessful deletion response and does not affect existing bookings.
